hero.title: Architecture Over Apps
hero.subtitle: We don't build websites — we install Unified Commercial Engines. Your digital presence becomes a proprietary Digital Sales Channel that sits on your balance sheet as a high-value financial asset, not a recurring overhead cost.

tiers.name: Phase I: The Diagnostic EKG
tiers.subtitle: Foundations & Perception
tiers.description: Every transformation begins with the Commercial EKG — a 250+ point Revenue Journey Assessment that identifies exactly where your revenue body is flatlining. We establish the Perimeter, set up your Gateway, and reclaim 15 hours a week by killing the Manual Entry Tax.
includes: Commercial EKG — full Revenue Journey Rubric
Custom CRM eliminating Manual Entry Tax

tiers.name: Phase II: Engine Orchestration
tiers.subtitle: Harmony & Execution — Recommended
tiers.description: Stop marketing decorating. Start revenue engineering. We install the Managed Nervous System — your operational radar — and achieve 60% automation across the lead-to-expansion lifecycle using Information Fusion.
includes: 4 Siloed Gateway Microsites for ad campaigns

tiers.name: Phase III: Unified Engine
tiers.subtitle: Sovereignty & The Alabrida Bridge
tiers.description: Replace the Frankenstein Tech Stack with your own Sovereign Engine. We migrate to proprietary infrastructure, eliminate six-figure vendor dependencies, and prepare the full Alabrida handoff to Commercial Sovereignty.
includes: The Alabrida Bridge — full sovereignty preparation

phases.name: The Commercial EKG
phases.description: High-fidelity diagnostic of your revenue operating system.
milestones: Execute the 250+ point Revenue Journey Rubric
Identify Missing Indicators across all 5 stages
Calculate your Frankenstein Index (tool overlap cost)
Pinpoint your Maturity Tier on the Staircase
Quantify the Manual Entry Tax draining your team

phases.name: MNS Orchestration
phases.description: Installing the Managed Nervous System — your operational radar.
milestones: Orchestrate current tools into a Single Source of Truth
Apply PMBOK Governance standards to all deliverables
Install Information Fusion for automated perception
Achieve Situation Awareness across the engine
Transition from Frankenstein Stack to Unified Engine

phases.name: The Sovereign Engine
phases.description: Replacing rented vendor space with proprietary infrastructure you own.
milestones: Deploy Sovereign Engine proof-of-concept on your cloud
Migrate to managed hosting — eliminate vendor lock-in
Build custom architecture replacing legacy CPQ/Billing

curriculum.description: Running the 250+ point Revenue Journey Rubric to find the structural flatlines in your revenue body.
Deploying 2-5 optimized social profiles as Signal Nodes for Dark Funnel capture.
Building the friction-free microsite that routes prospect intent to the correct conversion point.
Architecting the Digital Sales Channel — the multi-page Core designed for B2B deliberation.
Installing the Custom CRM and achieving Information Fusion to end Manual Entry Tax.
Digitizing offline networking instantly — signatures, business cards, and lead magnets with trackable QR codes.
Installing Clarity and Google Tags to achieve real-time buyer behavior perception via API.
Building 4 siloed landing pages — intent-isolated deliberation sandboxes that eliminate Decision Fatigue.
Executing the operational content calendar to maintain Information Velocity across the Perimeter.
Deploying Proof-as-a-Service — automated review requests that feed social proof into the Gateway and Core.
Auditing the hidden cost of overlapping SaaS tools and calculating your Complexity Tax.
Preparing the transition from Managed Nervous System to full Sovereign Engine — the path to Commercial Sovereignty.
